steps.t: Calenglad is at Tinnudir, the Ranger-camp on the shores of Lake Evendim. Daervunn has sent you to enlist the aid of Calenglad and the Rangers of Evend…
Calenglad is at Tinnudir, the Ranger-camp on the shores of Lake Evendim. You have done as Calenglad asked, and in his own way, he has bade farewell to…
